channel.title: STUF - Language Typology and Universals
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in STUF - Language Typology and Universals

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Christopher Lucas, Lameen Souag DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/stuf-2024-frontmatter4

item.title: Grammatical name marking in Chamorro
item.description: Article by Christopher Lucas, Lameen Souag DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/stuf-2024-2015

item.title: A cross-linguistic analysis of cross-clausal associations: Counterfactual conditionals
item.description: Article by Christopher Lucas, Lameen Souag DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/stuf-2024-2014

item.title: Non-core case marking in Batanic languages
item.description: Article by Christopher Lucas, Lameen Souag DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/stuf-2024-2013

item.title: Psych construction types in Arabic as root-based in templatic morphosyntax
item.description: Article by Christopher Lucas, Lameen Souag DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/stuf-2024-2012

item.title: A note on Jaradat, A. (2024) From nominal source to demonstrative: a case of grammaticalization in Standard Arabic
item.description: Article by Christopher Lucas, Lameen Souag DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/stuf-2024-2016
